title: Minimum CET1 requirement
text: Banks shall maintain a Common Equity Tier 1 capital ratio at or above the minimum regulatory threshold and internal risk appetite limits.

title: Tier 1 and total capital
text: Banks shall maintain Tier 1 and total capital ratios that meet or exceed minimum requirements after applying supervisory adjustments.

title: Liquidity Coverage Ratio
text: Banks shall hold sufficient high-quality liquid assets to survive a stressed 30-day funding scenario as measured by the LCR.

title: Net Stable Funding Ratio
text: Banks shall maintain a stable funding profile in relation to the composition of assets and off-balance sheet activities over a one-year horizon.

title: Leverage ratio
text: Banks shall calculate and disclose a leverage ratio to constrain the build-up of excessive leverage in the banking system.

title: RWA integrity
text: Methodologies for calculating risk-weighted assets shall be robust, documented, and subject to model governance and independent validation.

title: Stress testing
text: Banks shall perform periodic stress testing to evaluate resilience under adverse economic scenarios and inform capital planning.

title: Market discipline disclosures
text: Banks shall provide timely and consistent public disclosures on risk profile, capital adequacy, and risk management practices.
